variants: Adisami Puri currently resides in Thornwhistle Vale, where he applies his talents in Icelandic declensions. A graduate of Arborline Conservatory, he gained essential skills that led him to his position at Prism Flete Group. Originally from Cardinal's Rest, Adisami has built a professional reputation in the field, contributing to various linguistic projects within the organization. His life in Thornwhistle Vale allows him to balance his career pursuits with the peace of his surroundings.
